data.content:
Everything works. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

### Files created/modified

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Models/TicketData.cs` | ML.NET input (`TicketData`) + output (`TicketPrediction`) models |
| `Models/TicketRequest.cs` | API DTOs: `TicketRequest`, `PredictionResponse`, `EvaluationResponse` |
| `Services/TicketClassifierService.cs` | ML pipeline — featurizes Subject + Description text + Priority, trains SDCA Maximum Entropy classifier with 3-fold cross-validation |
| `Controllers/TicketsController.cs` | Two endpoints with input validation |
| `Program.cs` | Registers the service as singleton |

### Endpoints

- **`POST /api/tickets/train`** — Trains the model on `Data/tickets.csv`, returns cross-validated metrics (macro/micro accuracy, log-loss)
- **`POST /api/tickets/predict`** — Accepts `{ subject, description, priority }`, returns predicted category + per-class confidence scores

The low accuracy metrics are expected — only 6 training samples with 3-fold CV. Adding more training data to `tickets.csv` will improve results significantly.
